extra.message: User input from 'username' query parameter is concatenated directly into a Jinja2 template string via from_string(). This allows server-side template injection (SSTI), which can lead to remote code execution.

cwe: CWE-1336: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements in a Template Engine

extra.message: User input from 'username' query parameter is rendered into an HTMLResponse without proper escaping. An attacker can inject malicious scripts to execute in the victim's browser.

cwe: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
